title: gamogyne lurida
intro: Gamogyne lurida, also known as the yellow-flowered Gamogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gamogyne lurida include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosages.
